query: SELECT id, name, email, role, created_at FROM users WHERE role = 'corretor' AND (name LIKE '%teste%' OR name LIKE '%Teste%' OR email LIKE '%teste%' OR name LIKE '%Duplicação%' OR name LIKE '%duplicacao%') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50;
